response.step_by_step_log: 1. Monitored the entire video duration of 05:00 for any vocal music. 2. Confirmed that the audio consists solely of game sound effects and the VTuber's voiceover. 3. No vocal music tracks were detected. 4. Segregated the video into two primary scenes: farming (00:00-03:00) and combat (03:00-05:00).
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber playing a Minecraft-like game, focusing first on farming pumpkins and then on participating in a raid event. There is no vocal music in this video.

scenes.description: The VTuber is farming pumpkins in a Minecraft-style game while interacting with the audience. There is no vocal music.
The VTuber participates in a raid event in the game, fighting against enemy mobs. There is no vocal music.
